name: Lev’s Pawn Shop
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Columbus, OH (License #PB.100037) buying and selling jewelry, firearms, vehicles, collectibles, and tools with fast cash payouts.
description_long:
Lev's Pawn Shop is a licensed pawn operation located at 3446 E. Main St. in Columbus, Ohio, operating under License #PB.100037. The business positions itself as a family-owned establishment focused on providing quick cash for customers with valuable items to liquidate, while also maintaining an inventory of merchandise for resale to bargain-seeking shoppers.

The shop accepts a broad range of collateral and merchandise including jewelry, firearms and hunting equipment, vehicles, tools, electronics, and general collectibles. They advertise "top dollar" valuations for these items and claim to offer competitive pricing on resold goods. Their service model combines both the pawn loan function (short-term cash secured by collateral) and retail resale of previously owned items.

Lev's differentiates itself through family ownership and on-site staff availability, and maintains an active social media presence (Instagram and Facebook) to promote sales and inventory updates. They actively advertise specific promotions, such as their advertised sale on firearms, crossbows, and hunting equipment. The business operates extended hours (at least until 9am opening, though closing time not specified) and maintains direct contact channels via phone (614-231-1688) and email (levspawn2@gmail.com).

As a traditional pawn shop, this business serves customers who need immediate liquidity but may face challenges with conventional lending, though pawn transactions do not directly build credit history. The breadth of accepted items and stated focus on fair pricing makes them accessible to various customer segments, though borrowing costs (typically 10-25% monthly interest rates in pawn transactions) and inventory limitations are inherent to the pawn model.
pros: Licensed pawn operation (License #PB.100037) operating legally in Ohio
Family-owned business with stated customer service focus and on-site staff
Accepts diverse collateral types: jewelry, firearms, vehicles, tools, electronics, and collectibles
Fast cash availability without credit checks or lengthy applications
Active promotions and sales advertised (e.g., firearms and hunting equipment sales)
Multiple contact methods available (phone, email, social media)
Wide retail inventory available for customers seeking discounted used goods
cons: No specific interest rates or fee schedules disclosed on website
Limited business hours information provided (only 9am opening mentioned)
No online valuation tools or quotes available; requires in-person visit
Pawn transactions do not build credit history or establish payment records
Blog content outdated (last post November 2015), suggesting minimal website maintenance
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash for unexpected expenses without credit qualification
Sellers of collectibles, jewelry, or firearms seeking quick liquidation
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking discounted used vehicles, tools, and merchandise
People with limited access to traditional lending due to credit issues or employment status
diagnosis: Lev's Pawn Shop is best for people who need immediate cash and own valuable items they're willing to pledge as collateral, or bargain hunters seeking discounted used goods. The key caveat is that pawn loans carry typical industry-high interest rates (not disclosed on their website) and do not build credit—this is a short-term liquidity solution, not a credit-building tool.
services: Pawn loans (short-term cash advances secured by personal property)
Tool and equipment pawn and sales
Retail resale of pawned and purchased merchandise
